category_sources: Official Read the Docs page describes Subliminal as a Python library and CLI for searching and downloading subtitles.
source_facts.description says it is a library to search and download subtitles.
display_name_sources: Official Read the Docs heading uses Subliminal.
docs_sources: Official repository README links to subliminal.readthedocs.org as documentation.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Read the Docs documentation site.
repo_sources: Official Read the Docs site documents the same Subliminal project.
Official repository README identifies the project page as https://github.com/Diaoul/subliminal.
tags_sources: Official Read the Docs page describes Python library and CLI usage.
source_facts.description identifies subtitle search/download library functionality.
